title: 9 Signs a Godly Man's Humility Is Real
caption:
Real humility doesn't perform. It just shows up the same way whether anyone's watching or not.

Here are 9 signs it's the real thing, not a performance for an audience:

1. He takes correction without flinching.
2. He brags about other men, not himself.
3. He's the same on his knees alone as he is in the front row.
4. He asks questions he doesn't already know the answer to.
5. He lets a younger guy be right in front of everyone.
6. He apologizes without the excuse tacked on the end.
7. He does the job with no name attached to it.
8. He can hear no and stay in the room.
9. He points to God when it would be easy to point to himself.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." (James 4:6)

Save this and check yourself against it this week.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #character
